notes: v0.29.9 — Ship trail in-game now matches the shop preview. Every one of the 16 trail kinds (warm_ember, spectrum, glitch_invert, gold_burst, dust, pollen, light_dust, hairline, slice, synth_grid, dark_matter, sound_wave, musical, petal, light_ray, cyan_dash) renders its own silhouette behind your ship — was a plain colored circle regardless of which trail you bought. Trail dot sizes shaved ~25% in-game and in the shop preview so the trail reads as ship exhaust, not a halo cloud (fix for 'niektóre triale za grube'). Bullets and bullet trails already differentiated per kind so projectiles already matched; this brings the ship trail to parity.
